parsedJson.summary: The site has clear branding and a visible service area, but the first screen feels crowded, light on trust proof, and weak on mobile action paths.

issues.title: No mobile call button above the fold
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the header shows the Roof Space Renovators logo, a search icon, and a hamburger menu, but no visible phone number or call button.
issues.why_problem: A local-search visitor on their phone is often ready to call quickly. If they have to open the menu or scroll to find contact details, many will go back to Google and tap another business.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header with the logo on the left and a clearly visible tap-to-call button or phone icon on the right, plus a primary quote button visible within the first screen.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the mobile search icon with a prominent tap-to-call control, keep the hamburger menu, and add a sticky bottom bar with 'Call' and 'Free Quote' actions.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面一打开看不到可以直接打电话的按钮，客户要自己找联系方式。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户通常是在手机上边搜边联系，超过一半的本地搜索来自移动端；如果第一眼不能打电话，很多人会直接回到 Google 点下一家公司。

issues.title: Chat widget blocks key mobile content
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the 'We're Online!' chat box and blue chat button cover the lower part of the hero image and sit over the people cutout.
issues.why_problem: The chat widget competes with the main message and hides part of the page. On a small phone screen this makes the site feel cramped and can stop visitors from seeing the main next step.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A small chat launcher that stays collapsed on mobile, positioned so it does not cover hero text, faces, or the main call-to-action.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Set the chat widget to collapsed icon-only on mobile, move it above any sticky CTA bar, and delay the expanded message until after the visitor scrolls or spends several seconds on the page.
issues.plain_explanation: 聊天窗口在手机上挡住了首页内容，看起来很挤，也挡住了画面。
issues.customer_impact: 客户在手机上通常几秒内判断要不要继续看；重要内容被挡住会让人觉得网站不好用，从而减少询盘和电话。

issues.title: Quote action is not visible on mobile
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the yellow 'Get in touch for a free quote!' button appears in the hero, but in the mobile screenshot only the headline and chat widget are visible, with no quote button above the fold.
issues.why_problem: The desktop page gives visitors a clear next step, but the mobile page delays it. A phone visitor who is comparing roof-space or roofing businesses may not scroll far enough to find the quote action.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile first screen with a short headline, one supporting line, and a full-width yellow 'Free Quote' button visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Shorten the mobile hero text block, move the primary quote button directly under the headline, and keep a secondary call button fixed at the bottom of the screen.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑版有报价按钮，但手机版第一屏看不到，客户不知道下一步该点哪里。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地客户会同时打开几家公司比较；如果你的按钮不在第一屏，客户可能还没看到报价入口就离开了。

issues.title: No proof near the first impression
issues.what_observed: The hero area shows branding, a slogan, marketing copy, and a quote button, but no visible review rating, licence badge, years in business, project count, or before-and-after proof.
issues.why_problem: Roof and roof-space work is a high-trust purchase. A Google-searching customer needs fast reassurance that this is a real, experienced Brisbane business before they share details or request a quote.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Above-fold proof row with Google rating, years serving Brisbane, licence or insurance note, and a small before-and-after project thumbnail.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a compact trust strip directly under the header or hero headline: '4.8 Google rating', 'Brisbane roof-space specialists', 'Licensed and insured', and 'View before/after projects'.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页第一眼没有评价、资质、案例数量或施工前后对比，客户很难马上放心。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶和阁楼改造属于高金额、高风险服务；客户如果看不到可信证据，通常会先联系看起来更可靠的竞争对手。

issues.title: Desktop contact details are too quiet
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the address and phone number sit in a thin pale-grey strip above the logo and navigation, with light grey text and small icons.
issues.why_problem: The phone number is present, but it does not visually behave like an important action. A visitor scanning quickly may miss it and focus instead on the navigation links.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-contrast phone number styled as a clear action, such as a dark teal phone button or yellow 'Call 07 3889 6688' button in the main header.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move the phone number into the main desktop header as a prominent click-to-call button, keep the address smaller, and remove low-value social icons from the prime header area.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑版虽然有电话，但颜色太淡、位置太不起眼，不像一个重要按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 客户找不到电话就会少打电话；对本地服务商来说，每少一个电话都可能少一个报价机会。

issues.title: Hero image feels generic
issues.what_observed: The hero uses a teal-tinted room background with three surprised people cut out on the left, while the actual renovated roof space is heavily darkened behind the overlay.
issues.why_problem: The people cutout feels staged and does not show the workmanship clearly. A local customer wants to see real spaces, quality, and outcomes, not just a generic excited-family image.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A bright real project photo or before-and-after image of a Brisbane roof-space renovation, with people secondary or absent, and the finished space easy to inspect.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the stock-style people cutout with a high-resolution real project image, reduce the teal overlay opacity, and add a small before/after gallery link in the hero.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图更像素材图，真正的施工成果被颜色遮住了，看不清质量。
issues.customer_impact: 客户花钱前想看真实效果；如果看不到案例和做工，会降低信任，转去看有真实照片的商家。

issues.title: Hero text is heavy to scan
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the hero stacks a large slogan, a large headline, a question line, and a dense paragraph above the yellow quote button.
issues.why_problem: A search visitor is trying to decide quickly whether the business fits their problem. Too much text in the first screen slows them down and can bury the main offer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One clear headline, one short supporting sentence, three proof bullets, and one primary action button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the hero into a sharper structure: headline, one sentence explaining the roof-space outcome, three short benefit/proof points, then the quote and call actions.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页文字有点多，客户需要读一会儿才知道重点。
issues.customer_impact: 访客通常在几秒内决定要不要继续；文字越难扫读，越容易失去原本有需求的客户。

positive_observations: The service area line at the very top clearly names Brisbane, Sunshine Coast, Gold Coast, and Ipswich.
The logo is distinctive and readable on both desktop and mobile.
The yellow primary button on desktop stands out clearly against the teal hero area.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add visible mobile call and quote actions above the fold.
2. Replace the generic hero treatment with real project proof and trust badges.
3. Simplify the hero layout so the phone number, quote action, and proof are easier to scan.
